feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: To have a multiple associated CDS view with Enterprise project in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello team

Can we have many related CDS views in One CDS View? I need a sales order created for an enterprise project in the public cloud that includes the quantity, customer, net price, and other details. If I have completed any procurement processes, I also need to see the details of those processes, including the PR's and the purchase order details that were created. Can I combine all three of these into a single CDS view? If so, what all CDS views I must give in the JOIN CONDITION under Data Source. Is it feasible to display all of these data in a single CDS view?

Regards,

Gunadharshini

entry.title: Replenishment is not permitted for this storage type? Error scwm/repl004
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While attempting to execute planned replenishment I'm getting error scwm/repl004.

I'm working in S4 public cloud version 2502.  I've maintained the storage type with the same settings as storage type SF01 in the starter system which allows replenishment.

I've also assigned the product to a fixed bin within this storage type and maintained min and max quantities. What configuration am I missing to allow replenishment in this fixed bin storage type?

entry.title: bin-to-bin movement task to be auto-created after a UD is posted in QM
entry.content:
### Here's what WE need to know:


 


#### ✅ **What We Did.


 


1. **GRN** is posted → triggers **Put-away** in EWM.


2. Material goes to **clarification zone/bin** (likely due to quality inspection type set up in material master).


3. **Inspection lot** is automatically created via QM integration.


4. After **manual UD (Usage Decision)**, we’re doing a **manual bin-to-bin** to move material from clarification zone to final bin.


 


#### ❓ **Our Requirement:**


 


We want the **bin-to-bin movement task to be auto-created** (and optionally auto-confirmed) after a **UD is posted in QM**.


 


In this Grow with SAP (Public Edition) Embedded EWM is it possible to configure or not? If any feasibilities in this system then please help us to share the proper documents on it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Account Receivable support, Alternative account or not
entry.content:
Hi SAP Expert,

Could you please confirm whether AR support is using the Alternative account?

I cannot find the Alternative account in the Create outgoing invoice app.

Thanks,

Chanaporn S.

entry.title: Exception Messages in S/4HANA Public Cloud - MRP
entry.content: Hey, we would like to see exception notifications, in this case, rescheduling exceptions for delivery schedules. TheApp  "Schedule MRP Rescheduling Checks" is unfortunately only available for purchase orders. However, we need this for Delivery Schedule Segmentations. Unfortunately, the “MRP Situations” app only displays the exception message “Cancel delivery” and not the exception message 10 or 15. Is it possible to view these exception messages centrally in the public cloud?

entry.title: GL Accounts are not copied to Quality/Test system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have added new company code in CBC, and in customizing all GL accounts are copied to new company code.

Moved the TR to Quality system but not all GL accounts are copied

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Perú - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to run the SAP DRC enabled legal reports for my country. However, the reports are not displaying information and not processing any information the templates. Below, I detail the procedures performed.

1) In the CBC, an organizational structure for data processing has already been created.

2) Activation of the Document and Report Compliance (5XU) scope element has been requested.

3) My user has all the necessary roles for the execution of legal reports.

BR_AP_MANAGER_PE

BR_GL_ACCOUNTANT_PE

BR_ADMINISTRATOR

4) In the app, the reports are displayed.

5) However, in this application it does not allow to run legal reports.

Please support any additional configuration that may be required. ?

that might be required to run SAP DRC legal reports ?

Thanks,

Antony

entry.title: Use inbound service in BAdi to update the purchase order NetAmount
entry.content:
Is there a way we can update the Purchase Order NetPrice Amount? 

I have found this BAdi "MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM" but that is not allowed to change NetPrice Amount value. 

So, as an alternative way, I tried to use api in the logic but there is only outbound service in logic. 

IF cl_ble_http_client=>is_service_available(
communication_scenario = 'SAP_COM_0053'
outbound_service = ' '         " When write inbound_service, error message is shown.
) = abap_true.

As scenario SAP_COM_0053 has only inbound service, could you please guide me how should I write the logic to be able to use the inbound service?

entry.title: 4H2 Selfbilling - Can we have more than 999 billing items in single invoice and accounting document?
entry.content:
Hello,

we are going to implement 4H2 Selfbilling in SAP Public Cloud solution and the client raised a question, whether this module is able to process 1500 billing items within the same SBI Transfer. I know, that the limitation of the S/4HANA system was 999 billing items in the invoice and relevant accounting documents.

Is it possible to have more then 999 billing items in SAP Public Cloud in single SBI Invoice and relevant accounting document? Is there some customization/development needed to make this work?

Thanks!

entry.title: Account & requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting in bank statement items
entry.content:
Error KI248 Account & requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting is generated even after following instructions of kba 3113575 - Error message KI248 when posting a General Journal Entry we still get error in simulation of reprocessing of bank statement item 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: About "Operation defect rate (%) (AUFAK)" item in the work procedure master
entry.content:
Regarding the "Operation defect rate (%) (AUFAK)" item in the work procedure master,
the item does not exist in the migration cockpit, so how should I migrate the data?
There is no way to update the data after migration, so could you please tell me a good way to do this?

entry.title: ML4HMASTER229
entry.content:
We have made all the necessary adaptations in the S/4HANA Public Cloud system. However, when opening the material and entering the accounting master data, we encounter an error. What could be the reason?

Best regards.

entry.title: 历史导入固定资产减值业务如何操作
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

     请问历史导入固定资产减值业务如何操作呢,针对非历史导入资产,可以通过APP(过账资产重估)操作,但对历史导入资产操作时会报错,具体如附件截图,谢谢!

entry.title: Search function in the app "Display IAM-Apps" returns error code
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i noticed, that when i try to use the free text search function in the app "Display IAM-Apps" i get the error "ABAP Runtime error 'RAISE_SHORTDUMP'".
It also doesnt matter what i search. I tried this in 3 different tenants (TDD - Customizing Tenant, TDD - Development Tenant and a Customer Starter System Tenant) and all return the same error code. The individual filters in the app still work but not the free text search. Is this a configuration issue of some sort or a case for a ticket with SAP ?
Best regards Lukas

entry.title: Need to delete wrongly loaded materials or ability to change material type in mass in S4HC
entry.content:
Need to delete wrongly loaded materials or ability to change material type in mass in S4HC


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I make appear the internal price in the service quotation & Service order?
entry.content:
Dear all

I may have missed something, but in the price details in the service quotation or service order, there is no condition type reflecting the internal price that permit to have the cost related to the service needed to be quote.

It seems to be that if the item is not relevant to stock valuation, there is nothing in the price detail that offer the possibility to have a clear view about the cost. Even entering a price in the accounting view. Nothing is taken back and shown in price detail.

How do this needs have to be managed?

The sales rep needs to be able to have the cost reflected in the service quotation in the price detail in order to have the base to quote correctly.

Please help

Ingrid

entry.title: Stop Reservations Without Stock Available
entry.content: We Need to stop creating reservation for Material if there is no available Stock in Storage Location and check is there other reservations for Same material & Storage Location created

entry.title: Where can I find the non stock item catagery in service order?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I can't find the table related to the link between the product type, item category group and item category available for Service Order.

We need to use the non stock item category in solution order. The list in help sap provide this item category but we have no visibility of it in the system.

Please help to understand what are the actions to do to be able to have the non stock item category in the service order.

Thanks

Ingrid

entry.title: Why the following action creation of a sales order is not available in service order?
entry.content:
Dear all

I see that in the cloud public the functionality of following action ' creation of a sales order' is not available.

Does this means it is not possible to do it? How can we track the delivery of a tool that is send to the customer before the technical arrive on place to process a service?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: Custom field and logics
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have added a custom field using the "Custom Fields and Logic" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud under the Customer: General Information business context. The field is created and published successfully.

Now, I want this custom field to appear in the Customer Master Data Template specifically in the Tax tab. I am unsure about the following:

  1. How do I define the path for this custom field so that it appears in the Tax tab of the Customer Master Data Template?

  2. Do I need to use a different business context ?

  3. Are there any additional steps required to ensure this field is placed in the correct section and has the intended impact?

Best Regards,

Tehreem Fatima
